title: HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS - 211info
text: WOODBURN HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eligibility determination for Medicaid and SNAP, licensing of adult foster care homes, private and pre-admission nursing home assessments, Senior Peer Mentoring, and health and wellness programs. 2100 Progress Way Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and people with physical disabilities age 18 and over Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 981-5138 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 981-5138 Main phone (800) 846-9165 Adult Protective Services (888) 257-0138 Alternate Toll-free (888) 370-4307 TTY/TTD Main phone (503) 981-5138 Toll-free (888) 257-0138 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian and interpretation arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: If traveling north on I-5, take exit 271 (OR 214). At the light, turn right on Newberg Highway (OR 214) going east. Left on Meridian Drive. One-story building to the right. Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Foster Home Placement Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Mentoring Programs * Older Adults Nursing Facility Referrals Wellness Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Wellness Programs * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WOODBURN
